untranslatable_reason: Pattern requires detection of two distinct narrow inverted V-shaped peaks with specific morphology (Adam tops) and identification of a wide rounded Eve top component. These multi-bar structural patterns and relative peak-to-peak geometry cannot be fully expressed with point-in-time indicator values. The 'confirmation line as lowest low between two peaks' requires historical peak detection logic not available in the indicator set. Pattern is too complex for available indicators without custom pattern recognition functions.
